channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Singer adieu Performs Ascendance a Bookworm Part 3 Anime的 新作 Ending Song
item.description: Satoko Shibata penned Moka Kamishiraishi's song, to be heard in anime's 2nd half ― The staff for Ascendance of a Bookworm Part 3: Adopted Daughter of an Archduke, the new television anime of Miya... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Singer adieu Performs Ascendance of a Bookworm Part 3 Anime's New Ending Song
